candidates.name: affaan-m/ECC
candidates.title: ECC - Agent Harness Performance Optimization System
candidates.description: Agent harness performance optimization system covering skills, instincts, memory, security, and research.
candidates.signal_summary: Surged to 204k+ stars. Matches topic:mcp + pushed:>=2026-06-01 search. Heavy recent push activity 2026-06-02. README review unavailable due to GitHub rate limits. Repo review: low-risk, risk 0, trust 100.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Very high star count (204k) signals broad builder interest in agent harness optimization — skills, instincts, memory, security patterns.

candidates.name: MemPalace/mempalace
candidates.title: MemPalace
candidates.signal_summary: 53k stars, active 2026-06-03. Positioned as best-benchmarked open-source AI memory system. Not in current vnem registry.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Strong benchmark claims and high star count for an open-source AI memory system — directly relevant to agent memory evaluation.

candidates.name: gastownhall/beads
candidates.title: Beads - Memory Upgrade for Coding Agents
candidates.description: A memory upgrade for your coding agent.
candidates.signal_summary: 24k stars, pushed 2026-06-03. Explicitly targets coding agent memory. Not in current vnem registry.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Focused on-agent memory with strong community uptake (24k stars). Pairs with and complements existing memory entries.

candidates.name: atomicstrata/atomicmemory
candidates.title: Atomic Memory
candidates.description: Portable semantic memory for AI agents: core engine, TypeScript SDK, framework adapters, MCP server.
candidates.signal_summary: 138 stars, created 2026-05-18, active 2026-06-03. Includes MCP server and TypeScript SDK. Not in registry.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Portable semantic memory with MCP server + SDK adapters. Multi-framework support.

candidates.name: volcengine/OpenViking
candidates.title: OpenViking
candidates.description: Open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents (such as openclaw).
candidates.signal_summary: 25k stars, pushed 2026-06-03. From Volcengine. Not in registry. Focused on context database for agents.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Context database approach for agent state; significant community uptake. Different architectural angle from memory-layer entries.

candidates.name: HKUDS/nanobot
candidates.title: Nanobot
candidates.description: Lightweight, open-source AI agent for your tools, chats, and workflows.
candidates.signal_summary: 43k stars, active 2026-06-03. Lightweight agent for tools, chats, workflows. Not in registry.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: High star count for a lightweight agent framework. Directly relevant to agent builder workflow decisions.

candidates.name: conductor-oss/conductor
candidates.title: Conductor
candidates.description: Event driven agentic workflow engine providing durable and highly resilient execution.
candidates.signal_summary: 31k stars, pushed 2026-06-03. Event-driven agentic workflow engine. Not in registry.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Durable, resilient workflow execution for agentic systems. Mature project with significant uptake.

candidates.name: garyqlin/gbase
candidates.title: GBase - Recursive Self-Improvement Agent Framework
candidates.description: Recursive Self-Improvement Agent Framework with memory, evolution, quality gates, and identity system.
candidates.signal_summary: 103 stars, created 2026-05-25, active 2026-06-03. Newer entrant in recursive self-improvement agents. Not in registry.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Recursive self-improvement architecture with identity/quality gates. Emerging pattern worth tracking.

candidates.name: Narwhal - TUI Database CLI with built-in MCP server
candidates.title: Narwhal
candidates.description: TUI database client with a built-in MCP server. Five databases (postgres, mysql, sqlite, duckdb, clickhouse).
candidates.signal_summary: 33 stars, created 2026-05-27. Show HN. Database MCP server with multi-DB support. Not in registry.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Multi-database MCP server — postgres, mysql, sqlite, duckdb, clickhouse in one tool. Practical for agent DB access patterns.

candidates.name: NousResearch/hermes-agent
candidates.title: hermes-agent v0.15.2 (2026.5.29.2)
candidates.description: The agent that grows with you.
candidates.signal_summary: Release v2026.5.29.2 published 2026-05-29. 177k stars. Already tracked in daily digest. Not yet in registry. binary-first flags from release assets.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Hermes Agent is the runtime this brain runs on. Keeping its registry entry current matters for self-describing the stack.

reasons: Release assets include binary distributions. Standard for Python packages but noted.

candidates.name: MCP-Scan / Snyk Agent Scan - Security scanners for MCP servers
candidates.title: MCP Security Scanners
candidates.description: Security scanning tools for MCP servers, AI agents, and agent skills. Multiple projects active: mcp-scan (invariantlabs-ai), agent-scan (snyk).
candidates.signal_summary: Two dedicated MCP security scanners surfaced in HN discussions. Not in vnem registry. Important safety category.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Dedicated security scanners for MCP tool surface. Directly relevant to vnem's safety model and gateway roadmap.
